---
name: Documentation Task
about: Request to create or update documentation
title: "[DOC] <Document Name> - <Short description>"
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

**Document Name**
(e.g., `TEAM_TASKS.md`, `PULL_REQUEST_GUIDE.md`)

**Section to Update / Add**
Specify the exact section or heading.

**Purpose**
Why is this documentation needed?

**Checklist**
- [ ] Draft the new content.
- [ ] Review for clarity and completeness.
- [ ] Add internal links to other docs if needed.
- [ ] Ensure no confidential information is included.

**Additional Context**
Any background or references.
